'''Bengat''' was an [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] where the [[Aruzan/Legends|Aruzan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Manaroo/Legends|Manaroo]] once danced in competitions. She also rafted the planet's stormy [[Water/Legends|waters]] in between her participation in these events.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Payback: The Tale of Dengar|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1stm}}
